testcase.name: test_ws_connect_with_valid_admin_key

failure.message: TimeoutError: timed out during opening handshake

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:543: in __await_impl__ await self.connection.handshake( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:104: in handshake await asyncio.wait( /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:428: in wait return await _wait(fs, timeout, return_when, loop) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:535: in _wait await waiter E asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:539: in __await_impl__ async with asyncio_timeout(self.open_timeout): /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/timeouts.py:115: in __aexit__ raise TimeoutError from exc_val E TimeoutError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_admin_websocket_streaming.py:63: in test_ws_connect_with_valid_admin_key async with websockets.connect(ws_url, open_timeout=15) as ws: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:587: in __aenter__ return await self ^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:578: in __await_impl__ raise TimeoutError("timed out during opening handshake") from exc E TimeoutError: timed out during opening handshake

testcase.name: test_ws_connect_with_demo_only_filter

failure.message: TimeoutError: timed out during opening handshake

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:543: in __await_impl__ await self.connection.handshake( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:104: in handshake await asyncio.wait( /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:428: in wait return await _wait(fs, timeout, return_when, loop) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:535: in _wait await waiter E asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:539: in __await_impl__ async with asyncio_timeout(self.open_timeout): /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/timeouts.py:115: in __aexit__ raise TimeoutError from exc_val E TimeoutError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_admin_websocket_streaming.py:80: in test_ws_connect_with_demo_only_filter async with websockets.connect(ws_url, open_timeout=15) as ws: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:587: in __aenter__ return await self ^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:578: in __await_impl__ raise TimeoutError("timed out during opening handshake") from exc E TimeoutError: timed out during opening handshake
